featuredCaseStudy.title: Meridian Financial Tower
featuredCaseStudy.body: Bedrock was appointed as design-build contractor for Meridian's new 62-storey HQ in Singapore's Marina Bay district. The brief demanded LEED Platinum certification, a fixed GMP and delivery before the client's fiscal year end. We delivered eleven weeks early with zero surprise change orders — a first for the client's capital programme in 20 years.

projects.name: Meridian Financial Tower
projects.scope: 62-storey LEED Platinum headquarters for Meridian Financial Group. Delivered 11 weeks ahead of programme. First high-rise in the region to achieve LEED Platinum under v4.

projects.name: Cascade Cross-Harbour Bridge
projects.scope: 2.4km cable-stayed span connecting the North Shore with downtown Vancouver. Canada's longest cable-stayed bridge. 3,200 workers at peak; zero lost-time incidents.

projects.name: Harbor Logistics Park
projects.scope: 180,000 m² fully automated distribution centre for a global e-commerce operator. 98% robotics integration. BREEAM Outstanding rating.

projects.name: The Linden Residences
projects.scope: 340-home master-planned community with shared amenity spaces, sustainable landscaping and a 6-star energy rating across all dwellings.

projects.name: Solaris Research Campus
projects.scope: Net-zero R&D campus for Solaris Group. 12 laboratory buildings, 4 office towers and a central energy hub. 42% embodied carbon reduction vs. baseline.
